title: OpenAI GPT-5.4 now available as a Databricks-hosted model
body:
Mosaic AI Model Serving now supports OpenAI [GPT-5.4](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis/supported-models#openai-gpt-5-4) as a Databricks-hosted model. You can access this model using [Foundation Model APIs pay-per-token](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis#token-foundation-apis).

Customers are responsible for ensuring their compliance with the terms of OpenAI's [Acceptable Use Policy](/aws/en/machine-learning/model-serving/acceptable-use-models).
